revision.comment: doing this to force an update since the ambox redirect is messing with things
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23520214635|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= {{Ambox | name = One source | subst = {{subst:substcheck}} | type = content | class = ambox-one_source | image = [[File:Question book-new.svg|link=|50x40px]] | issue = {{{text|This section '''relies largely or entirely upon a [[Wikipedia:Identifying reliable sources|single source]]'''.}}} | fix = Please help [{{fullurl:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|action=edit}} improve this article] by introducing [[Wikipedia:Citing sources|citations]] to additional sources at this section.{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#if:{{{find|}}}|
{{find sources mainspace|{{{find}}} }}|}} | talk = {{{talk|#}}} | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = Articles needing additional references | all = All articles needing additional references |removalnotice = yes }} }} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:sn_crud|TESTOne source section]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= {{Ambox | name = One source | subst = {{subst:substcheck}} | type = content | class = ambox-one_source | image = [[File:Question book-new.svg|link=|50x40px]] | issue = {{{text|This section '''relies largely or entirely upon a [[Wikipedia:Identifying reliable sources|single source]]'''.}}} | fix = Please help [{{fullurl:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|action=edit}} improve this article] by introducing [[Wikipedia:Citing sources|citations]] to additional sources at this section.{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#if:{{{find|}}}|
{{find sources mainspace|{{{find}}} }}|}} | talk = {{{talk|#}}} | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = Articles needing additional references | all = All articles needing additional references |removalnotice = yes }} }} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:sn_crud|TESTOne source section]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24296132115|time triggered pipeline]]
Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24951476559|time triggered pipeline]]
